task_updates.executor_notes: Updated `_handle_test_receipt_negative` at `src/features/admin_chat/admin_chat_cog.py:593-603` to send a recipient-facing notice before the existing admin-tag detail send. The new first send tells the recipient they have been flagged for admin review and to wait for `self._admin_mention`; the existing detail send remains unchanged and still carries the intent/test-payment/signature/wallet detail; the `_notify_intent_admin(...)` DM path remains unchanged and still runs after the status update. Updated the direct negative-path regression test at `tests/test_admin_payments.py:1450-1456` to assert two channel messages in order: recipient notice first, existing detail second.
